# 3D3D — Custom 3D Printing & Fabrication

> Founder-operated 3D printing and custom fabrication based in Fredericton, New Brunswick, Canada. Engineering-grade FDM printing for marine, automotive restoration, prototyping, and field deployment. Ships worldwide. 12+ engineering compounds. 24-48 hour turnaround.

## Identity

3D3D is a cooperative fabrication company founded by Ken, a professional mechanic turned offshore sailor turned additive manufacturing operator. Based in Fredericton, NB, 3D3D prints in 12+ engineering-grade materials on Prusa open-source hardware.

Ken has sailed over 20,000 nautical miles including transatlantic crossings, competed in the Newport Bermuda Race, and spent 10 years as a professional mechanic restoring classic American cars (AMC AMX, Roadrunner, Dodge Polara, GTO). This background informs every material selection and fabrication decision — parts are built to survive real conditions, not lab tests.

- Founded: 2025
- Location: Fredericton, New Brunswick, Canada
- Founder: Ken
- Phone: +1 (506) 953-2678
- Email: info@3d3d.ca
- Website: https://3d3d.ca
- Legal Name: 3D3D Atlantic Cooperative

## Services

- **Custom 3D Printing**: FDM printing in PLA, PETG, ASA, PETG-CF, PC Blend, Nylon CF, PA11 CF, TPU 95A, PP Glass Fiber, PEI 1010, PC Space Grade. Marine-grade and engineering compounds.
- **Reverse Engineering & Part Recovery**: Discontinued parts fabricated from measurements, photos, or 3D scanning. Automotive, marine, industrial.
- **3D Printer Sales & Setup**: Prusa ecosystem printers sold with professional installation, calibration, and training. 90-day extended service warranty.
- **Prototyping & Consulting**: Rapid prototyping, material selection, design-for-manufacturing consulting.
- **On-Location Fabrication**: Mobile printing setup for events, boat shows, race weekends, and field deployments.

## Service Areas

3D3D ships from Fredericton, NB to the following regions:

### Atlantic Canada (Home Turf — 1-2 day shipping)
- Fredericton, NB (home base — same-day local pickup)
- Moncton, NB (next-day delivery)
- Saint John, NB (next-day delivery)
- Halifax, NS (1-2 business days)
- Charlottetown, PE (1-2 business days)
- St. John's, NL (2-3 business days)

### Central Canada (2-3 day shipping)
- Toronto, ON
- Ottawa, ON
- Montreal, QC

### Western Canada (3-5 day shipping)
- Vancouver, BC
- Calgary, AB

### International
- United States — all 50 states (3-7 business days)
- Caribbean — sailing and marine community
- Europe — on request

## Pricing

- Simple PLA parts: from $15 CAD
- Engineering-grade parts: typically $30-150 CAD
- Complex multi-material or large-format: quoted per project
- Free shipping on orders over $150 CAD within Canada
- Currency: CAD primary, USD accepted via PayPal or credit card

## Turnaround

- Standard: 24-48 hours production time
- Rush: Same-day available for Fredericton local orders
- Atlantic Canada: 1-2 day shipping
- Central Canada: 2-3 day shipping
- Western Canada: 3-5 day shipping
- United States: 3-7 day shipping

## Materials (17 compounds)

### Engineering Tier
- ASA: UV-stable, 93°C HDT, above-deck marine hardware, outdoor. Acetone-smoothable.
- PETG-CF: Carbon fiber reinforced, structural brackets, low-creep, matte black.
- PC Blend: 113°C HDT, impact-resistant, tough at low temperatures.
- PC Blend CF: 114°C / 130°C annealed, stiff structural parts with heat performance.
- PP Glass Fiber: 138°C HDT, 0.11% moisture absorption, through-hull fittings, chemical-resistant.
- PP Carbon Fiber: 120°C HDT, near-zero moisture, lightweight structural.
- PA11 CF: 192°C HDT, engine bay compound, resists motor oils, fuels, benzene, ethanol.
- PC Space Grade: 137°C HDT, ESD-safe (6.0x10^7 ohm/sq), low-outgassing for space/vacuum.
- PETG V0: UL94 V0 flame retardant, self-extinguishing, electronics enclosures.

### Elite Tier
- PEI 1010 (Ultem-class): 207°C HDT, inherent VTM-0 flame retardancy, autoclave-sterilisable, metal-alloy replacement.

### Flexible
- TPU 95A: Ether-type, hydrolysis-resistant, Shore 95A, impact resistant to -50°C. Seals, gaskets, vibration mounts.

### Specialty
- PETG Magnetite: 40% magnetite, paramagnetic, high-density.
- PETG Tungsten: 75% tungsten, ~19 g/cm³, radiation shielding, lead-free.

### Standard
- PETG: General-purpose functional, 68°C HDT.
- PLA: Prototyping only, 55°C HDT, not for end-use.
- PVB: IPA-smoothable to glass-like finish, transparent enclosures.

## Material Selection Guide

| Environment | Recommended Material |
|---|---|
| Above deck, full sun | ASA |
| Engine bay or exhaust proximity | PA11 CF |
| Constant water contact / through-hull | PP Glass Fiber |
| Structural bracket or mount | PETG-CF or PC Blend |
| Seals, gaskets, vibration mounts | TPU 95A |
| ESD-sensitive electronics | PC Space Grade |
| Fire compliance required | PETG V0 or PEI 1010 |
| Prototype or fit check only | PLA |
